title: Kaido Descends on Wano
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Beast Pirates, Luffy, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Speed as The truth of the Kozuki retainers and Wano’s time-displaced rebellion is revealed as Kaido’s power closes in.
scene: Kaido appears in dragon form and turns the Wano rebellion into an immediate confrontation.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Straw- Hat-ya!! What are you doing, you bastard!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: With that huge body, he probably hasn't figured out what's happened yet!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Are you trying to ruin our plan?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: If I beat him up now...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kin'Emon's allies and my crew, as well as your's...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We don't even know if they're safe!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: gyaaaah!! Master Kaido is looking this way.....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Huh!? He looks drunk, doesn't he!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So, you came to the WAND Country..!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Whoaaa Aaaa!! What the hell is with this guy!?

summary: This section advances the Wano Country - Kozuki Secret storyline with 24 dialogue beats. Kaido’s arrival turns the rebellion from a secret plan into a brutal confrontation.
